description: Cross-tabulates current passenger-car inspection results by registration-year age bands. Use for whether older cars fail more. Registry inspection field only, not a time-bounded campaign.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" AND SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar IS NOT NULL AND _foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= 2030 | EVAL age_band = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar < 2005, "Before 2005", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2010, "2005-2009", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2015, "2010-2014", _foerste_registrering_aar < 2020, "2015-2019", "2020 or newer") | STATS car_count = COUNT(*) BY age_band, inspection_result = SynResultatStruktur.SynResultatSynsResultat.keyword | SORT age_band ASC, car_count DESC | LIMIT 40
